name: librespeed
tagline: A self-hosted internet speed test with a minimal web interface
description: LibreSpeed is a self-hosted internet speed test that doesn’t require external servers. It measures download, upload, and ping speeds through a minimal web UI and supports multiple languages and custom deployments.

features.title: Internet Speed Testing
features.description: Measure download, upload, and latency from the browser

features.title: Web-Based Test Interface
features.description: Run speed tests without installing client software

features.title: Server Mode
features.description: Host a speed test server on your own network

features.title: Test History
features.description: View results of previous speed tests

features.title: Minimal Dependencies
features.description: Run the test service with minimal requirements

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Host the speed test on your own servers
